examples.en: Let's go to the cinema tonight.
examples.vi: Tối nay đi xem phim nhé.

examples.en: I often go to the cinema on weekends.
examples.vi: Tôi thường đi xem phim vào cuối tuần.

collocations: go to the cinema with friends
go to the cinema on Friday
go to the cinema near my house

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Do you want to go to the cinema?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Sure, what movie?

examples.en: We played football at the park.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi đã chơi bóng đá ở công viên.

examples.en: She walks her dog at the park every morning.
examples.vi: Cô ấy dắt chó đi dạo ở công viên mỗi sáng.

collocations: at the park near my house
at the park with my family

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Where did you go yesterday?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: I went to the park with my sister.

examples.en: We built a sandcastle on the beach.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi đã xây lâu đài cát trên bãi biển.

examples.en: They relaxed on the beach all day.
examples.vi: Họ thư giãn trên bãi biển cả ngày.

collocations: on the beach near the hotel

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Did you enjoy your holiday?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Yes, we spent every day on the beach.

examples.en: There are many shops in the city center.
examples.vi: Có nhiều cửa hàng ở trung tâm thành phố.

examples.en: I work in the city center.
examples.vi: Tôi làm việc ở trung tâm thành phố.

collocations: in the city center of Hanoi
in the city center on weekends
in the city center near the square

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Where is your office?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: It's in the city center, near the lake.

examples.en: We took a taxi to the airport.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi đã đi taxi ra sân bay.

examples.en: It's faster to take a taxi.
examples.vi: Đi taxi nhanh hơn.

collocations: take a taxi to the station
take a taxi from the hotel

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: How do we get to the museum?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Let's take a taxi.

examples.en: I got lost in the old town.
examples.vi: T��i đã bị lạc ở phố cổ.

examples.en: Don't get lost! Use the map.
examples.vi: Đừng để bị lạc! Hãy dùng bản đồ.

collocations: get lost in a new city

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Are you okay? You look worried.

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: I think I got lost. Can you help me?

examples.en: I asked a policeman for directions.
examples.vi: Tôi đã hỏi đường một cảnh sát.

examples.en: You can ask for directions at the information desk.
examples.vi: Bạn có thể hỏi đường ở quầy thông tin.

collocations: ask for directions to the station
ask for directions on the street

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Excuse me, can I ask for directions?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Sure, where do you want to go?

examples.en: Go straight for two blocks.
examples.vi: Đi thẳng hai dãy nhà.

examples.en: Then go straight until you see the bank.
examples.vi: Sau đó đi thẳng cho đến khi bạn thấy ngân hàng.

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: How do I get to the post office?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Go straight and turn left at the traffic lights.

examples.en: Turn left at the corner.
examples.vi: Rẽ trái ở góc đường.

examples.en: Turn right after the bridge.
examples.vi: Rẽ phải sau cây cầu.

collocations: turn left at the traffic lights
turn left into the parking lot

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Is the supermarket near here?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Yes, turn right at the next street.

examples.en: The bank is across from the post office.
examples.vi: Ngân hàng ở đối diện bưu điện.

examples.en: We stayed at a hotel across from the beach.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi ở khách sạn đối diện bãi biển.

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Where is the restaurant?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: It's across from the cinema.

examples.en: The library is next to the school.
examples.vi: Thư viện ở bên cạnh trường học.

examples.en: She lives next to a supermarket.
examples.vi: Cô ấy sống bên cạnh một siêu thị.

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Is there a pharmacy near here?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Yes, it's next to the bakery.

examples.en: Is there a bus stop near here?
examples.vi: Có trạm xe buýt nào gần đây không?

examples.en: I work near here.
examples.vi: Tôi làm việc gần đây.

example_dialogue.speaker: A
example_dialogue.text: Excuse me, is there a toilet near here?

example_dialogue.speaker: B
example_dialogue.text: Yes, there's one in the shopping mall.
